_purpose: FROZEN construction for the real-data L2 run. Set BEFORE looking at any event data, from the verified synthetic robustness sweep (docs/experiment_reports/multiband_ssa_2026-06-18.md sec 4B, where DS-AUC was 0.94-1.00 and the DS-vs-min-angle margin +0.45..+0.57 across this whole grid). Do not tune these against real event outcomes; tune only on stable/synthetic AOIs.
circularity_guard: NBR uses B8/B12; for the recovery (L3) claim prefer MTBS dNBR class polygons, or require DS to track recovery timing better than raw reflectance does.
gate0_rule: On 1 documented event AOI: does d1(t) peak within +-delta_days of the event date? YES -> scale to all AOIs. NO after honest debugging on STABLE/SYNTHETIC data only -> stop, invoke diagnostic-paper fallback.
